definition.en: The temporal information is incomplete.
An event with at least one agent that is participant in it in a given time.
The outcome of an Action

usage.en: It could be an activity (e.g., to do something) or an physical or digital entiity (e.g., report).

definition.en: A supportive class connecting agents with a role they play.
The type of Agent.
Frequency of an Request over time (e.g., every 6 months, each quarter).
A portion of legal source expression including a mandate that produces at least one Action.
A kind of Result
Role is played by and Agent involved in the Request.
The kind of role of the agent as is described in the legal resource.
Status of Action.
Function of the temporal infomation in legislation.

usage.en: for instance as deadline, moment of entering into force, etc.

definition.en: Individual people or groups of people, like an institution with a legal recognition, who have the potential to perform intentional actions for which they can be held responsible.
The intellectual realisation of a Work in the form of identifiable immaterial objects, such as, but not limited to, text.
The physical embodiment of an Expression, either on paper or in any electronic format.
Institutions or groups of people that have obtained a legal recognition as a group and can act collectively as agents.
A real person who live or has lived.
Any distinct intellectual creation (i.e., the intellectual content), in the context of ELI.
The datatype of language-tagged string values.

A literal value such as a string or integer; Literals may be typed, e.g. as a date according to xsd:date. Literals that contain human-readable text have an optional language tag as defined by BCP 4715.
An anyURI represents an Internationalized Resource Identifier Reference (IRI).
A boolean represents the values of two-valued logic.
The string datatype represents character strings in XML.
An idea or notion; a unit of thought.

usage.en: However, what constitutes a unit of thought is subjective, and this definition is meant to be suggestive, rather than restrictive.

definition.en: A temporal entity with zero extent or duration
A temporal entity with non-zero extent or duration.

usage.en: The value of the start time and end time properties should be different,and/or a duration should be given.

definition.en: The involvement of an agent in a role within this action.

usage.en: The involvement of the agent may be time dependent.

definition.en: A note added by way of comment or explanation.

usage.en: This property is included to capture any information of value identified by a domain expert and that is valuable to be shared with other experts.

definition.en: A note added by way of comment or explanation.

usage.en: This property is included to capture any information of value identified by a domain expert and that is valuable to be shared with other experts.

definition.en: The frequency in which the request is to be executed in case of repetitive mandate.
A succeeding action

usage.en: A request may formulate a repetitive sequence of actions. This property chains the actions together.

definition.en: A result of an action.
A status of this Action.
The topic of the request.
A kind of result
Assign the type to SKOS controlled vocabulary.
URI of the Request.
The unit of the Frequency
The action that is produced by a request.
The value of the frequency.
The property linking an Agent to Role.

Indicates that this work or expression legally changes another. This encompasses the notions of amendment, replacement, repeal, or other types of change. This may be a direct change (textual or non-textual amendment) or a consequential or indirect change.

usage.en: This relation cannot reuse the eli URI as it would force the class to be an eli:Expression

definition.en: Citation in the text of the legislation. This may be at the legal resource or legal expression level, as required by the implementation context. This includes verbatim citation and citations in referrals.
Relates a manifestation to the expression that it embodies. Inverse of "is_embodied_by".
Relates an expression to a manifestation of that expression.
Indicates a work in which this one is physically included. Covers the case of text included in an Official Journal, or an article included in a text.
Relates a work to an expression of this work in the form of a "sequence of signs" (typically alpha-numeric characters in a legal context).
Relates an expression to a work realised through that expression. Inverse of "is_realized_by".
Indicates a somehow related other document, not necessarily a legal resource.

usage.en: This relation cannot reuse the eli URI as it would force the class to be an eli:Expression

definition.en: Indicates a somehow related other document, not necessarily a legal resource.

usage.en: This relation cannot reuse the eli URI as it would force the class to be an eli:Expression

definition.en: A related resource in which the described resource is physically or logically included.

usage.en: Replaced eli:is_part_of with dct:isPartOf because of the domain constraint. TBD.

definition.en: Title of the action result
A preferred label of the concept.

usage.en: This property can be repeated for parallel language versions of the label.

definition.en: Time instant at which the Period was initiated
Time instant at which the Period was terminated.
